Title: Add new folder in Assets
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Assets module accessible
Steps:
1. Navigate to Assets
2. Click Add New Folder
3. Enter folder name
4. Confirm
Expected Result: New folder created in assets root

Title: Delete folder via right-click
Steps:
1. Right-click on folder
2. Select Delete
3. Confirm
Expected Result: Folder deleted successfully

Title: Bulk delete folders via checkboxes
Steps:
1. Select multiple folders via checkboxes
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm
Expected Result: All selected folders deleted

Title: Search assets
Steps:
1. Enter search term in assets search field
2. Verify results
Expected Result: Assets filtered by search term

Title: Copy asset link
Steps:
1. Right-click on asset
2. Select Copy Link
Expected Result: Asset URL copied to clipboard

Title: Sort columns in assets list
Steps:
1. Click column header to sort
2. Verify sort order changes
Expected Result: Assets sorted by selected column

Title: Upload file to root folder
Steps:
1. Navigate to Assets root
2. Click Upload
3. Select file from filesystem
4. Wait for upload
Expected Result: File uploaded to root folder successfully

Title: Upload picture to custom folder
Steps:
1. Navigate to custom folder
2. Upload picture file
Expected Result: Picture uploaded to custom folder; thumbnail displayed

Title: Upload non-picture file to custom folder
Steps:
1. Navigate to custom folder
2. Upload non-image file (PDF/DOC)
Expected Result: Non-picture file uploaded successfully with correct icon

Title: Upload via Drag and Drop
Steps:
1. Drag file from filesystem
2. Drop onto assets area
Expected Result: File uploaded via drag and drop

Title: Upload via Select from filesystem
Steps:
1. Click upload area
2. Select file from file picker dialog
Expected Result: File uploaded via file selection dialog

Title: Upload via URL
Steps:
1. Click Upload via URL
2. Enter file URL
3. Confirm
Expected Result: File downloaded from URL and added to assets

Title: Download file/picture
Steps:
1. Select file
2. Click Download (or right-click > Download)
Expected Result: File downloaded to local system

Title: Download non-picture file
Steps:
1. Select non-image file
2. Click Download
Expected Result: Non-image file downloaded correctly

Title: Add asset via drag and drop to entity
Preconditions: Entity form with asset field open
Steps:
1. Drag file from filesystem
2. Drop onto asset field in entity form
Expected Result: Asset attached to entity via drag and drop

Title: Add asset via select from filesystem field
Preconditions: Entity form with asset field open
Steps:
1. Click asset field
2. Select file from picker
Expected Result: Asset attached to entity via file picker

Title: Remove asset via checkbox selection
Steps:
1. Select asset checkbox
2. Click Remove
Expected Result: Asset removed from entity

Title: Get link of assigned asset
Steps:
1. Click on asset
2. Copy/get link
Expected Result: Asset link retrieved successfully

Title: Right-click delete asset
Steps:
1. Right-click on asset
2. Select Delete
3. Confirm
Expected Result: Asset deleted

Title: External link asset
Steps:
1. Add asset via external link
2. Save
Expected Result: External link asset reference saved

Title: Blob storage - add folder
Steps:
1. Navigate to Blob storage assets
2. Add new folder
Expected Result: Folder created in blob storage

Title: Blob storage - upload and download
Steps:
1. Upload picture to blob storage folder
2. Upload non-picture file
3. Download each file
Expected Result: Files upload and download correctly from blob storage

Title: Blob storage - upload via drag and drop and URL
Steps:
1. Upload file via drag and drop to blob storage
2. Upload file via URL to blob storage
Expected Result: Both upload methods work for blob storage

Title: Blob storage - delete folder and bulk delete
Preconditions: Blob storage folders and files exist
Steps:
1. Delete folder via right-click
2. Bulk delete via checkboxes
Expected Result: Folder and bulk delete work in blob storage
